approval.note: Repository changes require diff-bound review and green CI before merge.

title: SW-014 — Add source adapter programme
goal: Add Git/GitHub, Lenskit, Cabinet, Vault, Obsidian Bridge, Leitstand, Chronik and optional enrichment adapters with explicit contracts.

acceptance.assertion: Every adapter declares authority, visibility, freshness and failure semantics.
Each adapter has deterministic healthy, stale, partial and failed fixtures.
Adapter failure cannot silently emit fresh-looking facts.
Adapters can be added without making optional systems prerequisites.
